# Freyr Technology AI Website Context

Freyr Technology AI presents itself as a high-performance computing service provider focused on advanced and customized computing resources for AI model training and inference. The public website is currently reduced to model pricing and privacy information.

## Website Purpose

The site is a static, no-database website for visitors reviewing model pricing. Home, model catalog, API docs, and solutions pages redirect to pricing.

## Primary Content

The Pricing page presents text and image generation model prices loaded from Freyr's public model info API, with static fallback data available in `/assets/pricing.json`.

The Privacy Policy page is draft legal copy for review. It should not be treated as final legal advice.

## Important Caveats

Model availability, official pricing, endpoint domains, authentication, API data retention, logging policies, and privacy promises must be confirmed by Freyr before production launch. Static browser code must not expose private API keys, signatures, or cloud-provider credentials.
